section_name: Display or Work Outside Fence Prohibited
chapter_title: Auto. Wrecking & Salvage Yards in Certain Counties
text: An owner or operator of an automotive wrecking and salvage yard or that person’s agent or employee may not display, store, or work on a junked or wrecked automotive vehicle or a part, accessory, or junk from the vehicle outside or above the fence required by this chapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 397. Auto. Wrecking & Salvage Yards in Certain Counties
##### § 397.007 — Display or Work Outside Fence Prohibited

An owner or operator of an automotive wrecking and salvage yard or that person’s agent or employee may not display, store, or work on a junked or wrecked automotive vehicle or a part, accessory, or junk from the vehicle outside or above the fence required by this chapter.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: An owner or operator of an automotive wrecking and salvage yard or that person’s agent or employee may not display, store, or work on a junked or wrecked automotive vehicle or a part, accessory, or junk from the vehicle outside or above the fence required by this chapter.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
